Text: The author of the communication is a Turki.b citi.en of Kurdish ethnic origin, currently residing in France, where he is .pplying for political asylum. He claims to be a victim of torture allegedly perpetrated by Turkish police in May of 1989. Turkey made the declaration provided for in article Z2 of the Convention on 2 August 1988.
